## Requirements

<!--
Use EARS format — one sentence per requirement, every requirement must be testable.

Patterns:
  Ubiquitous:   The <system> shall <response>.
  Event-driven: WHEN <trigger>, the <system> shall <response>.
  State-driven: WHILE <state>, the <system> shall <response>.
  Conditional:  IF <condition>, THEN the <system> shall <response>.
  Option:       WHERE <feature is enabled>, the <system> shall <response>.

Rules:
  - "shall" = mandatory. "should" = desirable. "may" = optional.
  - Avoid untestable adjectives: "user-friendly", "fast", "reliable" — use measurable thresholds.
  - One requirement = one sentence. Split compound requirements.
  - Every REQ below must appear verbatim or by reference in Acceptance Criteria.
-->

- REQ-01:
- REQ-02:
